title: poa borreri
intro: Poa borreri, also known as Borrer's meadow-grass or Borre's grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and wounds. The health benefits of Poa borreri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in healing various skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
